findings.description: Alan Glen Applegarth's father was John Obrien Applegarth, born 7 October 1905 in Oshkosh, Garden County, Nebraska, who died 1 April 1998 in Ogden, Weber County, Utah.
supporting_sources: 1940 U.S. Census, South Boise Election Precinct, Ada County, Idaho — household of John O. and Olive Applegarth, with son Alan
1950 U.S. Census, Ogden, Weber County, Utah — household of John O and Olive H Applegarth

findings.description: Alan Glen Applegarth's mother was Olive Annie Harvey, born 29 July 1906 in Kaysville, Davis County, Utah, who died 19 August 1970 in Ogden, Weber County, Utah.
supporting_sources: 1940 U.S. Census, South Boise Election Precinct, Ada County, Idaho — household of John O. and Olive Applegarth, with son Alan
Marriage of John Obrien Applegarth and Olive Annie Harvey, 20 October 1926, Ogden, Weber County, Utah
